questions.question: What European nation's lottery, The Fat One, had a record jackpot of $270 million, in 1997?

What was the fourth nation to explode an atomic bomb?
Which Hershey's chocolate has more caffeine per ounce than a cup of joe—Krackel Special Dark or Mr. Goodbar?

What was once known in lunch counter lingo as a "Coney Island chicken"?
